description: The dashboard provides a single pane of view of critical parameters like MTTR, MTBF, Mean Time to Acknowledge, MTTR over time, MTBF over time that helps provide all the information about the Incident process in one place.

panels.description: Mean time to resolution of incidents within the selected set of filters

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Avg MTTR in days
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` AS 'C1',
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` AS 'C1',
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI`

LIMIT 100

panels.title: MTTR ( in days)

panels.description: Mean time between failure of incidents within the selected set of filters

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Asset Availability -> Avg MTBF in days
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: Avg(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Time Between System Incidents`)

groupByField.selectionColumnName: Date -> AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`) AS '__time__',
Avg(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Time Between System Incidents`) AS CF1
FROM
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` 
INNER JOIN (`HPD:Help Desk` )
ON (`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Name` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`)
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`

LIMIT 100

leftOperand.fieldName: AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date
AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date

selectionList.selectionColumnName: AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`) AS '__time__',
Avg(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Time Between System Incidents`) AS CF1
FROM
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` 
INNER JOIN (`HPD:Help Desk` )
ON (`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Name` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`)
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`

LIMIT 100

panels.title: MTBF

panels.description: The ratio derived by total Major Incidents (MI flag as ‘Yes’) that were closed to the total number of closed incidents

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT

(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes') THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` END)*1.00)*100/(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved')) THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` END)*1.00) As percentage
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
WHERE (
   (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service)) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status`= 'Closed'
   AND `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000
)
having COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved')) THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` END) > 0

panels.title: Major Incidents (%)

panels.description: The total number of closed incidents which were within the Response and Resolution  SLM/SLA levels

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Percentage of SLA Met Incidents
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS 'C1',
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company))
and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status`= 'Closed'
and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000))
having SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved') THEN 1 END)*1 > 0

panels.title: SLA Met Incidents (%)

panels.description: Mean time to acknowledge of incidents within the selected set of filters

properties.value: Mean time to acknowledge in hrs

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Avg MTTAcknowledge in hours

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) AS 'Submit_Date',
AVG(DateDiff('ss',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Responded Date`)/3600) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`)
ORDER BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) ASC
 
LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`) AS 'Submit_Date',
AVG(DateDiff('ss',`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Reported Date`,`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Responded Date`)/3600) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`)
ORDER BY
DATE(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`) ASC
 
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Mean time to acknowledge ( in hrs)

panels.description: The total number of incidents that were a result of a change request

properties.value: Number of Incidents caused by Change Requests

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
COUNT (DISTINCT
(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Association Type01` = 'Caused by' AND `HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change') THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` END)) As c1
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
INNER JOIN `HPD:Associations_Archive` ON (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` = `HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Request ID02`)
WHERE (
   (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service)) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status`= 'Closed'
   AND `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000
)

panels.title: Incidents caused by Change Requests

panels.description: The total number of incidents that were re-opened after being closed

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Percentage of Reopened Incidents
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)*1.00

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS 'C1',
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Re-Opened Date` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved')) THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` END)*1.00) 
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company))
and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status`= 'Closed'
and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000))
having COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` In ('Closed','Resolved')) THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` END) > 0

panels.title: Re-open Incidents (%)

panels.description: Mean time to resolution of incidents within the selected set of filters over time

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Avg MTTR in days
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END)

groupByField.selectionColumnName: Date -> HPD:Help Desk -> Last Resolved Date

meta.rawSql:
SELECT
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) AS '__time__',
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS Avg_MTTR_in_days
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`)
ORDER BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ASC
 
LIMIT 100

sortOperand.selectionColumnName: Date -> HPD:Help Desk -> Last Resolved Date

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
DATE(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Last Resolved Date`) AS __time__,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS Avg_MTTR_in_days
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` = 'Closed' 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Last Resolved Date`)
ORDER BY
DATE(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Last Resolved Date`) ASC
 
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Mean time to acknowledge Trend

renameByName.Avg_MTTAcknowledge_in_days: Mean time to acknowledge in days

panels.description: Comparison of the volumes of incidents that were a result of the change requests over time

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
   COUNT (DISTINCT
(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Association Type01` = 'Caused by' AND `HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change') THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` END))
 As C1,
  Date(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`) AS __time__
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
INNER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Associations_Archive`
	ON (
	   `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Incident Number` = `HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Request ID02` 
	    	)
WHERE (
   `HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Association Type01` = 'Caused by' AND
   `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company) AND
   `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` = 'Closed'
   AND `HPD:Associations_Archive`.`Request Type01` = 'Infrastructure Change'
   AND (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service)) 
   AND `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000
)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`)
Order By Date(`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`) ASC

panels.title: Incidents caused by Change Requests Trend

panels.description: Analysis of MTTR by support groups

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assigned Group` Is not Null THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`
WHERE (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service)) and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status`= 'Closed'
and (`HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY AssignedGroup
Limit 10

panels.title: MTTR by support groups

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT (CASE WHEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` IS NOT NULL THEN `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Company` ELSE 'Unknown' END) Company FROM `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive` WHERE `HPD:Help_Desk_Archive`.`Status` In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled') LIMIT 1000"}
list.label: Company
list.name: company

title: Closed Incidents Metrics Archive
